ogTitle: Rainbow Beach vs Ramsay: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Rainbow Beach and Ramsay.
heading: Rainbow Beach vs Ramsay — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Rainbow Beach, Queensland and Ramsay, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Rainbow Beach has a lower overall climate risk score (37/100) compared to Ramsay (38/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Rainbow Beach or Ramsay safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Rainbow Beach has a flood risk score of 39/100, while Ramsay scores 28/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Rainbow Beach scores 26/100 for bushfire risk. Ramsay scores 63/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Rainbow Beach or Ramsay?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Rainbow Beach has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.22% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
